THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZEE, ROBERT W. VAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 125 SIXTH ST. #405, S.F. AGREES THAT THERE WILL NO ABSOLUTELY NO FURTHER CONTINUANCES GRANTED REGARDING HIS EVICTION, SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH....
